_notes: OECD membership as of May 2026: 38 member states. Most recent accession: Costa Rica (May 2021), Colombia (April 2020), Latvia (2016), Lithuania (2018). Candidate countries (Argentina, Brazil, Bulgaria, Croatia, Peru, Romania) are NOT included — only full members.
name: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
mission: Intergovernmental economic organisation of mostly high-income democracies, promoting policies to improve economic and social well-being. Conducts statistical research and sets international economic norms.
